parts[parts.length - 1].trim() : ""; lastPart = lastPart.replace(/\s*(CA|California)\s*\d*/i, "").trim(); if (lastPart.length < 3 && parts.length > 1) { lastPart = parts[parts.length - 2].trim(); } city = lastPart; if (isShared) { decision = "DECLINE"; reason = "Shared ride"; } else if (rating > 0 && rating < minRating) { decision = "DECLINE"; reason = "Low rating " + rating; } else { var excluded = false; for (var i = 0; i < excludeList.length; i++) { var ex = excludeList[i].trim().toLowerCase(); if (ex.length > 0 && city.toLowerCase().indexOf(ex) > -1) { decision = "DECLINE"; reason = excludeList[i].trim(); excluded = true; break; } } if (!excluded && pickup_min > maxPickup) { decision = "DECLINE"; reason = pickup_min + " minute pickup"; excluded = true; } if (!excluded) { var chainValues = {}; try { chainValues = JSON.parse(global("CHAIN_VALUES_JSON") || "{}"); } catch(e) {} var now = new Date(); var currentHour = now.getHours(); var arrivalMin = pickup_min + trip_min; var arrivalHour = (currentHour + Math.floor(arrivalMin / 60)) % 24; var currentCity = global("CURRENT_CITY") || "Unknown"; var defaultChain = parseFloat(global("DEFAULT_CHAIN_VALUE") || "20"); var landingKey = city + ":" + arrivalHour; var stayKey = currentCity + ":" + currentHour; var chainRate = chainValues[landingKey] || defaultChain; var stayRate = chainValues[stayKey] || defaultChain; if (global("PASSENGER_IN") === "1") { performTask("Queue Ride Evaluator", 10); var currentFare = parseFloat(global("CURRENT_FARE") || "0"); var currentPPM = parseFloat(global("CURRENT_PPM") || "0"); if (fare - currentFare > 5 || per_mile - currentPPM > 0.25) { decision = "ACCEPT"; reason = "Better ride redirect"; } else { decision = "DECLINE"; reason = "Worse than current"; } } else { var totalMin = pickup_min + trip_min; var rideValue = totalMin > 0 ?
